message.content:
I need to build a Snippet Manager screen (SCRN002) for a Raycast UI clone. Please find and read:

1. The existing clipboard history view component (src/components/clipboard_history/) - this is the pattern to follow
2. The clipboard data file (src/data/clipboard_data.ts) - for data pattern
3. App.tsx - how clipboard history is wired into navigation
4. The types.ts file - for existing type definitions
5. Any existing snippet-related code or form components

Give me the full content of each file found, especially:
- ClipboardHistoryView component (full content)
- clipboard_data.ts (full content)
- App.tsx (full content)
- types.ts (full content)
- Form component exports (index.ts)

Focus on understanding the navigation push pattern, how views are structured, and how actions work.

content.text: I'll search for all the relevant files in parallel.
Now I'll read all the key files in parallel.
